languages.text: {n}Триасомата замирает — плечи несчастного медленно опускаются, судороги сходят на нет. Ясность разума держится недолго — вскоре глаза амальгамы пустеют, а рот растягивается в блаженной улыбке. Умиротворенно покачиваясь и пуская слюну, он бормочет обрывки фраз из прошлой жизни и молитвы Императору.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly slump and the convulsions steadily subside. His lucidity does not last long. The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Триасомата замирает — плечи несчастного медленно опускаются, судороги сходят на нет. Ясность разума держится недолго — вскоре глаза амальгамы пустеют, а рот растягивается в блаженной улыбке. Умиротворенно покачиваясь и пуская слюну, он бормочет обрывки фраз из прошлой жизни и молитвы Императору.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly drop, and the convulsions fade away. His clarity of mind does not last long. Shortly, the amalgam's eyes go blank, and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly slump and the convulsions steadily subside. His lucidity does not last long. The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly drop, and the convulsions fade away. Raising his exhausted eyes to you, he whispers,{/n} "What will become of me now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

{n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly drop, and the convulsions fade away. His clarity of mind does not last long. Shortly, the amalgam's eyes go blank, and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly slump and the convulsions steadily subside. His lucidity does not last long. The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}トライアスモータの呪いが解けた。貧しい男の肩はゆっくりと落ち、痙攣は消えていく。疲れた目をあなたに向け、彼はささやく。{/n}「これからどうなってしまうのでしょうか、御{mf|殿|女殿}？」
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly drop, and the convulsions fade away. Raising his exhausted eyes to you, he whispers,{/n} "What will become of me now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}三畳の呪いが解けた。貧しい男の肩はゆっくりと落ち、痙攣は消えていく。疲れた目をあなたに向け、彼はささやく。{mf|「これからどうなってしまうのでしょうか、御{mf|殿|女殿}？」{/n}

languages.text: {n}三相体停了下来——那可怜人的肩膀慢慢垂落，抽搐也逐渐平息。可清醒只维持了片刻，很快，这拼接体的眼神就变得空洞，嘴角咧开平和的痴笑。他平静地摇晃着身体，流着口水，嘴里嘟囔着往昔生活的零碎往事，以及献给帝皇的祷词。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly slump and the convulsions steadily subside. His lucidity does not last long. The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}三相体停了下来——那可怜人的肩膀慢慢垂落，抽搐也逐渐平息。可清醒只维持了片刻，很快，这拼接体的眼神就变得空洞，嘴角咧开平和的痴笑。他平静地摇晃着身体，流着口水，嘴里嘟囔着往昔生活的零碎往事，以及献给帝皇的祷词。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le Triasomata s'arrête. Les épaules du pauvre homme s'affaissent lentement et les convulsions s'estompent progressivement. Sitôt passé ce bref instant de lucidité, son regard s'éteint et sa bouche s'étire en un sourire béat. La bave aux lèvres, il se balance paisiblement d'avant en arrière en ressassant des bribes de sa vie passée et en marmonnant des prières à l'Empereur.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly slump and the convulsions steadily subside. His lucidity does not last long. The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El triasómata se detiene. Sus hombros se encorvan lentamente y las convulsiones remiten. Pero esta lucidez no dura. Los ojos de la amalgama pronto quedan en blanco y su boca esboza una sonrisa feliz. Se mece, tranquilo y babeante, y murmura retazos de su vida pasada y plegarias al Emperador.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata stops — the poor man's shoulders slowly slump and the convulsions steadily subside. His lucidity does not last long. The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Üçyeköz duruyor. Zavallı adamın omuzları yavaşça çöküyor, kasılmaları giderek azalıyor. Berraklığı uzun sürmüyor. Amalgamın gözleri kısa sürede boşalıyor. Ağzı, mutlu bir gülümsemeyle geriliyor. Huzur içinde sallanıp salyaları akarken eski hayatından kopuk parçalar ve İmparator'a dualar mırıldanıyor.{/n}

The amalgam's eyes soon go blank and his mouth stretches into a blissful smile. Rocking peacefully and drooling, he murmurs broken snippets from his former life and prayers to the Emperor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Triasomata bleibt stehen — die Schultern des armen Mannes sinken langsam ein und die Krämpfe lassen nach. Seine Klarheit ist nicht von Dauer. Wenig später werden die Augen des Amalgams glasig und er lächelt glückselig. Er schaukelt friedlich hin und her, murmelt sabbernd Bruchstücke seines einstigen Lebens und betet zum Imperator.{/n}
